raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Legislature has passed a package of new laws designed to combat organized retail theft.",
    "The Select Committee on Retail Theft focused on assessing the root causes of organized retail theft.",
    "The new laws include increased time behind bars for certain crimes related to retail theft.",
    "The legislation provides enhanced tools for law enforcement to charge and prosecute offenders of organized retail theft.",
    "New provisions in the laws address socio-economic factors contributing to theft, such as poverty and unemployment.",
    "The Organized Retail Theft Vertical Prosecution Grant Program was created to help local prosecutors develop specialized teams for complex theft cases.",
    "The initiative aims to dismantle criminal networks involved in large-scale retail theft."
  ]
}
```
